revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{基礎情報 日本の神 | 名 = 児玉彦命 | 世代名 = [[守矢氏|神長守矢氏]] 第四代 | 神祇 = [[国津神]] | 全名 = 児玉彦命 | 別名 = | 別称 = | 神階 = | 神格 = [[鍛冶]]の神 | 陵所 = | 父 = [[片倉辺命]] | 母 = | 配偶者 = [[美都多麻比売神]] | 子 = [[八櫛神]] | 神社 = [[児玉石神社]] など | 関連氏族 = [[守矢氏]] }} '''児玉彦命'''（こだまひこのみこと）は…」
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 日本の神 | 名 = 児玉彦命 | 世代名 = [[守矢氏|神長守矢氏]] 第四代 | 神祇 = [[国津神]] | 全名 = 児玉彦命 | 別名 = | 別称 = | 神階 = | 神格 = [[鍛冶]]の神 | 陵所 = | 父 = [[片倉辺命]] | 母 = | 配偶者 = [[美都多麻比売神]] | 子 = [[八櫛神]] | 神社 = [[児玉石神社]]　など | 関連氏族 = [[守矢氏]] }} '''児玉彦命'''（こだまひこのみこと）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪地方]]の[[民間信仰]]（[[諏訪信仰]]）の[[神 (神道)|神]]。 ==概要== [[ファイル:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|サムネイル|{{Center|『守矢氏系譜』における[[守矢氏]]の最初の五代
（洩矢神から八櫛神まで）}}]] [[明治]]時代初期に成立した[[守矢氏]]の家系図『神長守矢氏系譜』によれば、
[[建御名方神|大神]]御子[[片倉辺命]]之御子也、大神之御言之随[[千鹿頭神]]之跡乎継弖主祭政、[[守達神]]御子[[美都多麻比売神]]乎娶弖[[八櫛神]]乎生諏訪教育会 編「[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24 神長守矢氏系譜]」『諏訪史料叢書　巻28』1938年、34頁[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm　千鹿頭神（洩矢神の系譜）] :（大神の御子片倉辺命の御子なり。大神の御言の随に、千鹿頭神の跡を継ぎて祭政を主る。守達神の御子・美都多麻比売神を娶りて、八櫛神を生む。）
とある。このことから守矢氏の系図では児玉彦命を四代目に数えられる。『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 ==系譜== 片倉辺命の子であり、母は明らかでない。后神である守達神の子、美都多麻比売命との間に八櫛神が生まれる。この神は守矢氏の五代目とされる。 ==祀られている神社== *[[児玉石神社]]（長野県諏訪市湯の脇） == 参考文献 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[建御名方神]] *[[片倉辺命]] *[[千鹿頭神]] *[[守矢氏]] *[[児玉石神社]] {{諏訪信仰}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こたまひこのみこと}} [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:国津神]] [[Category:諏訪信仰|神ちかと]]

revision.comment: /* 祀られている神社 */ [[泰山神社]]
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 日本の神 | 名 = 児玉彦命 | 世代名 = [[守矢氏|神長守矢氏]] 第四代 | 神祇 = [[国津神]] | 全名 = 児玉彦命 | 別名 = | 別称 = | 神階 = | 神格 = [[鍛冶]]の神 | 陵所 = | 父 = [[片倉辺命]] | 母 = | 配偶者 = [[美都多麻比売神]] | 子 = [[八櫛神]] | 神社 = [[児玉石神社]]　など | 関連氏族 = [[守矢氏]] }} '''児玉彦命'''（こだまひこのみこと）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪地方]]の[[民間信仰]]（[[諏訪信仰]]）の[[神 (神道)|神]]。 ==概要== [[ファイル:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|サムネイル|{{Center|『守矢氏系譜』における[[守矢氏]]の最初の五代
（洩矢神から八櫛神まで）}}]] [[明治]]時代初期に成立した[[守矢氏]]の家系図『神長守矢氏系譜』によれば、
[[建御名方神|大神]]御子[[片倉辺命]]之御子也、大神之御言之随[[千鹿頭神]]之跡乎継弖主祭政、[[守達神]]御子[[美都多麻比売神]]乎娶弖[[八櫛神]]乎生諏訪教育会 編「[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24 神長守矢氏系譜]」『諏訪史料叢書　巻28』1938年、34頁[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm　千鹿頭神（洩矢神の系譜）] :（大神の御子片倉辺命の御子なり。大神の御言の随に、千鹿頭神の跡を継ぎて祭政を主る。守達神の御子・美都多麻比売神を娶りて、八櫛神を生む。）
とある。このことから守矢氏の系図では児玉彦命を四代目に数えられる。『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 ==系譜== 片倉辺命の子であり、母は明らかでない。后神である守達神の子、美都多麻比売命との間に八櫛神が生まれる。この神は守矢氏の五代目とされる。 ==祀られている神社== * [[児玉石神社]]（長野県諏訪市湯の脇） * [[泰山神社]]（長野県[[下伊那郡]][[高森町]]） == 参考文献 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[建御名方神]] *[[片倉辺命]] *[[千鹿頭神]] *[[守矢氏]] *[[児玉石神社]] {{諏訪信仰}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こたまひこのみこと}} [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:国津神]] [[Category:諏訪信仰|神ちかと]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Shinto deity|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == Related Topics == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Shinto deity|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == Related Topics == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:unsorted link categories]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]

His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == Related Topics == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Shinto deity|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == Related Topics == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]][[category:unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-27]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]

{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == Related Topics == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-27]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == Related Topics == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-27]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-27]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[ja:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]]

As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, revision.text:
{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikato no Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikato no Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[Category:SuQqqqqq]] [[Category:qqqq]] [[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]][[sn:odamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:11]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]] [[Category:New]]

His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-27]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:odamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Removing this excess]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya Clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/qq85913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya Clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya Clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya Clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:Ugoodbye $1 categories]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects 1-27]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:odamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]] [[Category:New]]

{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/qq85913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 1]][[ja:児玉彦命]][[Category:Suwa Faith topics in the template that need translation to English]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] [[Category:refreshing redirects]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]] [[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:odamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Suwa Faith}}[[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] {{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Tier 2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Deity of Blacksmithing|ja|鍛冶}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|kami|ja|神 (神道)}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|ja|諏訪地方}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji Period|ja|明治時代}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa City|ja|諏訪市}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町}}, {{ill|Shimoina District|ja|下伊那郡}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|ja|建御名方神}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社}} == References == {{Reflist}}{{DEFAULTSORT:Kodama-hiko no Mikoto}} [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] 3 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:児玉彦命 up to rev 87516306
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 日本の神 | 名 = 児玉彦命 | 世代名 = [[守矢氏|神長守矢氏]] 第四代 | 神祇 = [[国津神]] | 全名 = 児玉彦命 | 別名 = | 別称 = | 神階 = | 神格 = [[鍛冶]]の神 | 陵所 = | 父 = [[片倉辺命]] | 母 = | 配偶者 = [[美都多麻比売神]] | 子 = [[八櫛神]] | 神社 = [[児玉石神社]]　など | 関連氏族 = [[守矢氏]] }} '''児玉彦命'''（こだまひこのみこと）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪地方]]の[[民間信仰]]（[[諏訪信仰]]）の[[神 (神道)|神]]。 ==概要== [[ファイル:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|サムネイル|{{Center|『守矢氏系譜』における[[守矢氏]]の最初の五代
（洩矢神から八櫛神まで）}}]] [[明治]]時代初期に成立した[[守矢氏]]の家系図『神長守矢氏系譜』によれば、
[[建御名方神|大神]]御子[[片倉辺命]]之御子也、大神之御言之随[[千鹿頭神]]之跡乎継弖主祭政、[[守達神]]御子[[美都多麻比売神]]乎娶弖[[八櫛神]]乎生諏訪教育会 編「[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24 神長守矢氏系譜]」『諏訪史料叢書　巻28』1938年、34頁[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm　千鹿頭神（洩矢神の系譜）] :（大神の御子片倉辺命の御子なり。大神の御言の随に、千鹿頭神の跡を継ぎて祭政を主る。守達神の御子・美都多麻比売神を娶りて、八櫛神を生む。）
とある。このことから守矢氏の系図では児玉彦命を四代目に数えられる。『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 ==系譜== 片倉辺命の子であり、母は明らかでない。后神である守達神の子、美都多麻比売命との間に八櫛神が生まれる。この神は守矢氏の五代目とされる。 ==祀られている神社== * [[児玉石神社]]（長野県諏訪市湯の脇） * [[泰山神社]]（長野県[[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]） == 参考文献 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[建御名方神]] *[[片倉辺命]] *[[千鹿頭神]] *[[守矢氏]] *[[児玉石神社]] {{諏訪信仰}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こたまひこのみこと}} [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:国津神]] [[Category:諏訪信仰|神ちかと]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[児玉彦命]] to [[Kodamahiko-no-Mikoto]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 日本の神 | 名 = 児玉彦命 | 世代名 = [[守矢氏|神長守矢氏]] 第四代 | 神祇 = [[国津神]] | 全名 = 児玉彦命 | 別名 = | 別称 = | 神階 = | 神格 = [[鍛冶]]の神 | 陵所 = | 父 = [[片倉辺命]] | 母 = | 配偶者 = [[美都多麻比売神]] | 子 = [[八櫛神]] | 神社 = [[児玉石神社]]　など | 関連氏族 = [[守矢氏]] }} '''児玉彦命'''（こだまひこのみこと）は、[[長野県]][[諏訪地方]]の[[民間信仰]]（[[諏訪信仰]]）の[[神 (神道)|神]]。 ==概要== [[ファイル:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|サムネイル|{{Center|『守矢氏系譜』における[[守矢氏]]の最初の五代
（洩矢神から八櫛神まで）}}]] [[明治]]時代初期に成立した[[守矢氏]]の家系図『神長守矢氏系譜』によれば、
[[建御名方神|大神]]御子[[片倉辺命]]之御子也、大神之御言之随[[千鹿頭神]]之跡乎継弖主祭政、[[守達神]]御子[[美都多麻比売神]]乎娶弖[[八櫛神]]乎生諏訪教育会 編「[https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24 神長守矢氏系譜]」『諏訪史料叢書　巻28』1938年、34頁[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm　千鹿頭神（洩矢神の系譜）] :（大神の御子片倉辺命の御子なり。大神の御言の随に、千鹿頭神の跡を継ぎて祭政を主る。守達神の御子・美都多麻比売神を娶りて、八櫛神を生む。）
とある。このことから守矢氏の系図では児玉彦命を四代目に数えられる。『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006年、31頁 ==系譜== 片倉辺命の子であり、母は明らかでない。后神である守達神の子、美都多麻比売命との間に八櫛神が生まれる。この神は守矢氏の五代目とされる。 ==祀られている神社== * [[児玉石神社]]（長野県諏訪市湯の脇） * [[泰山神社]]（長野県[[下伊那郡]][[高森町 (長野県)|高森町]]） == 参考文献 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == *[[建御名方神]] *[[片倉辺命]] *[[千鹿頭神]] *[[守矢氏]] *[[児玉石神社]] {{諏訪信仰}} {{DEFAULTSORT:こたまひこのみこと}} [[Category:日本の神]] [[Category:国津神]] [[Category:諏訪信仰|神ちかと]]

[[ja:児玉彦命]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q109594446]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:35, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q109594446]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_Rank = | divine_role = [[:en:Metalsmith|Deity of Blacksmithing]] | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a [[:en:Kami|kami]] worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]]:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|qq=|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|qq=|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District]], Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * [[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]] * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] }} [[ja:児玉彦命]] [[Category:pages with merged translations]] ==Merged second translation== {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | generation = Fourth generation of {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = [[:en:Metalsmith|Kaji]] deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ([[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]]). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District, Nagano]], Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * [[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]] * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] }} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}}

Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a [[:en:Kami|kami]] worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]]:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|qq=|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|qq=|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District]], Nagano | divine_nature = [[:en:Metalsmith|Kaji]] deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ([[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]]). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District, Nagano]], Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * [[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]] * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] }} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}}

"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ([[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]]). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District, Nagano]], Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * [[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]] * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] }} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}}
