[[:en:Metalsmith|Kaji]] deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ([[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]]). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District, Nagano]], Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * [[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]] * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:pages with merged translations]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q109594446]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 04:15, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_Rank = | divine_role = [[:en:Metalsmith|Deity of Blacksmithing]] | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a [[:en:Kami|kami]] worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]]:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, [[:en:Suwa, Nagano|Suwa City]], Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, [[:en:Shimoina District, Nagano|Shimoina District]], Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * [[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]] * clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist}} {{Suwa according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji period]], Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ([[:en:Takeminakata|Takeminakata]]). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|en|Suwa, Nagano|WD=Q846338|lt=Suwa City}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:pages with merged translations]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_Rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Deity of Blacksmithing}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Kami|en|Kami|WD=Q524158|lt=kami}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|en|Suwa, Nagano|WD=Q846338|lt=Suwa City}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] ==Merged second translation== {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | generation = Fourth generation of {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Kaji}} deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:pages with merged translations]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji "The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:pages with merged translations]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

[[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_Rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Deity of Blacksmithing}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Kami|en|Kami|WD=Q524158|lt=kami}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|en|Suwa, Nagano|WD=Q846338|lt=Suwa City}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] ==Merged second translation== {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | generation = Fourth generation of {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Kaji}} deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:pages with merged translations]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Kaji}} deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Shikinaisha merges]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

[[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_Rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Deity of Blacksmithing}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Kami|en|Kami|WD=Q524158|lt=kami}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|en|Suwa, Nagano|WD=Q846338|lt=Suwa City}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist}} {{Suwa to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji "The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}

守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|en|Suwa, Nagano|WD=Q846338|lt=Suwa City}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya Faith}} {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] ==Merged second translation== {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | generation = Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Kaji}} deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Shikinaisha merges]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano|1=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Shikinaisha merges]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

[[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | generation_name = {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} Fourth Generation | divine_Category = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto | other_names = | other_titles = | divine_Rank = | divine_role = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Deity of Blacksmithing|1=Metalsmith}} | burial_site = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = | spouse = {{ill|Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yatsukushin|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsukushin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and others | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a {{ill|Kami|en|Kami|WD=Q524158|lt=kami|1=Kami}} worshiped in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, as part of the {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|{{Center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} as depicted in the genealogical text}}]] According to the {{ill|Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja|神長守矢氏系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} compiled in the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}:
{{ill|Oogami|ja|大神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oogami|1=Ōkami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10937139}}’s child, {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, begot Kodama-hiko no Mikoto, who succeeded the position of {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} in accordance with the divine words of Oogami. He married Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, and they bore Yatsukushin.{{Cite book |title=Kaminaga Moriya clan Genealogy|author=Suwa Educational Association|year=1938|page=34|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24}}[http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm Chikatojin (Genealogy of Moreya Clan)]
As such, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is regarded as the fourth generation in the genealogy of the Moriya clan.『続・高部の文化財』高部歴史編纂委員会編、2006th year 、31頁 == Genealogy == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, though his mother is unknown. His spouse, Mitutama-hime no Kami, the daughter of Moritatsu no Kami, bore him Yatsukushin, who is regarded as the fifth generation in the Moriya clan’s genealogy. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined in the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yuno-waki, {{ill|Suwa, Nagano|en|Suwa, Nagano|WD=Q846338|lt=Suwa City|1=Suwa, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisan Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Takamori Town|ja|高森町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takamori Town|1=Takamorimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q31469}}, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District|1=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikatojin|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatojin|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == References == {{Reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] [[Category:Shikinaisha merges]] ==Merged second translation== {{Infobox deity | name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | generation = Fourth generation of {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} | deity = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Kaji|1=Metalsmith}} deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano|1=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Shikinaisha merges]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]

{{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Kodama-hiko no Mikoto (児玉彦命) | aliases = | alternate_names = | Rank = | divine_nature = {{ill|Metalsmith|en|Metalsmith|WD=Q838566|lt=Kaji|1=Metalsmith}} deity | tomb = | father = {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} | mother = Unknown | consort = {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | children = {{ill|Yasugami|ja|八櫛神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasugami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | shrines = {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, etc. | related_clans = {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} }} '''Kodama-hiko no Mikoto''' (児玉彦命) is a deity of {{ill|Suwa Faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社|1=Suwa Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q2370082}}, a traditional belief system rooted in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|The first five generations of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} lineage according to the ''Genealogy of the Moriya clan'' (洩矢神から八櫛神まで).]] According to the genealogy of the {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}, compiled during the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is described as follows:
"The son of Katakurabe no Mikoto, a child of the Great Deity ({{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}). Following the command of the Great Deity, he succeeded {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} as the overseer of rituals and governance. He married Mitsutama-hime, daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they bore Yasugami."{{Cite web|title=Genealogy of the Moriya clan|url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/1185913/24|publisher=Suwa Historical Association|year=1938|access-date=2023-12-04}}{{Cite web|title=Chikato and the Moriya Lineage|url=http://yatsu-genjin.jp/suwataisya/sanpo/tikatousin.htm|publisher=Yatsu Genjin|access-date=2023-12-04}}
This makes Kodama-hiko no Mikoto the fourth generation of the Moriya lineage.''Continued Cultural Assets of Takabe,'' Takabe History Compilation Committee, 2006, p. 31. == Lineage == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is the child of {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}}, with his mother unknown. He married {{ill|Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja|美都多麻比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsutama-hime no Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, the daughter of {{ill|Moritachi no Kami|ja|守達神|1=Moritachi no Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|13=User:Immanuelle/Moritachi no Kami|qq=}}, and they had Yasugami, who is regarded as the fifth generation of the Moriya clan. == Shrines == Kodama-hiko no Mikoto is enshrined at the following locations: * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Yunowaki, Suwa City, Nagano Prefecture) * {{ill|Taisan Shrine|lt=Taisan Shrine|lt=Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|ja|泰山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taizan Shrine (Takamori)|qq=}} (Takamori Town, {{ill|Shimoina District, Nagano|en|Shimoina District, Nagano|WD=Q726999|lt=Shimoina District, Nagano|1=Shimoina District, Nagano}}, Nagano Prefecture) == References == {{reflist}} == See Also == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|WD=Q9150391|WD=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Katakurabe no Mikoto|ja|片倉辺命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Katakurabe no Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Chikato|ja|千鹿頭神|1=Chikatō-no-Kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikato|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatō-no-Kami|qq=}} * {{ill|Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}} * {{ill|Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja|児玉石神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kodama-ishi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Suwa Faith}} [[:en:Category 8|Category 8]] {{translated page|ja|児玉彦命|version=87516306|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:児玉彦命]] {{wikidata link|Q109594446}} [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:Completion tier 4]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:pages]]
